intro: Experience the ultimate in next-generation detail, bringing the breathtaking power of modern warfare directly to your screen.
description:
"The pinnacle of visuals, the essence of tactics. The most perfect modern warfare you'll ever encounter."
<Counter Attack> is an FPS game where you fulfill your operator's destiny by facing unforgiving battlefields and advanced threats lurking beyond the border.
The eye of a massive storm that will change the course of war. Your infiltration will usher in a new era of modern warfare.

■ Incredible visuals across amplitudes
Extreme graphics, perfectly calculated to the slightest light source and shadow. The vivid realism created by next-generation engines forces you to the heart of modern warfare.

■ Perfect synergy, the best combination for victory
Assault's firepower, engineer's skill, support commitment, Recon's insight. As soon as each bottle's own gadget meshes, the tactic is complete. Experience a thrilling collaborative action that wins goals in the name of a team that are impossible to do alone.

■ overwhelming maneuverability to change the speed of tactics
Break through the physical limits of the battlefield with powerful tactical maneuvering equipment. Run through rough terrain, catch the enemy off guard, and take the lead faster than anyone else to shake the battlefield at once.

■ A battlefield without limits, your will becomes the route
An overwhelming scale open field that leads beyond the horizon. There is no established path. Pioneer direct penetration paths across vast swaths of land, and design your own strategic engagement that will reverse the course of the battlefield.

■ Occupation, destruction, and total annihilation
Overwhelming scale Siege in three iconic modes. Break down enemy lines of defense with the real destructive effects of the next generation of physical engines, and roar victory at the pinnacle of the battlefield.

Synopsis
International straits, the lifeblood of the global economy, have been completely blocked by a massive armed force.
Amid the chaos that threatens to cripple the global energy grid, enemies are on the verge of completing the next generation of weapons that will threaten humanity by waking up prohibited technologies hidden deep underground.
Worst situation where formal diplomacy and international community intervention are impossible. To end an unrecorded war, a single top secret order is given to the best agents that do not exist in the world.
"Unauthorized penetration, disallowed destruction. But an operation that must succeed."

Answer the battlefield's call from the end of the horizon. Your input soon becomes the formula for victory, and one of your feet changes the battlefield. 
Now, be part of the special forces that will make the impossible possible and start a legend.
